title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates how he used Claude Code to build a product generating $481,000 annually in 45 days with zero-experience developers. He presents five core steps: shipping fast from problem definition, engineering critical workflows while outsourcing non-critical ones, learning vocabulary rather than code details, deliberate planning before implementation, and identifying potential failure modes before launch.
